# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

.gitlab-ci.yml
stages:
  - build
  - deploy:dev
  - deploy:staging
  - deploy:prod

variables:
  APP_NAME: my-awesome-app
  BUILD_DIR: build

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}
    - echo "Simulating compilation of ${APP_NAME}..."
    - echo "Binary content for ${APP_NAME}" > ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.bin
    - echo "Config content for ${APP_NAME}" > ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.conf
    - ls -R ${BUILD_DIR}
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "$CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"

deploy_dev_job:
  stage: deploy:dev
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to development environment..."
    - ls -R ${BUILD_DIR}
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.bin
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.conf
    - echo "Executing ${APP_NAME} in dev..."
    - echo "Deployment to dev successful for commit $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_staging_job:
  stage: deploy:staging
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - ls -R ${BUILD_DIR}
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.bin
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.conf
    - echo "Executing ${APP_NAME} in staging..."
    - echo "Deployment to staging successful for commit $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  when: manual

deploy_prod_job:
  stage: deploy:prod
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - ls -R ${BUILD_DIR}
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.bin
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/${APP_NAME}.conf
    - echo "Executing ${APP_NAME} in prod..."
    - echo "Deployment to prod successful for commit $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  when: manual
